content:
i just started the game, like.. immediately, right now, What banner should i pull on? i have an extremely noob team, I have these people for a team

What character (currently on banner) or banner is meta? or atleast can get me to progress further

My other question: What are these currencies? What do they do

For the currencies:
1st - Rose Scrips
It's like the typical main general currency from gacha games. It's used when upgrading characters, upgrading covenants, for synthesis (crafting materials), and there's a shop for it.

2nd - Silver Prime
It's the paid premium currency of the game. You use it to buy the moon phase vigil (monthly sub), curriculum (battlepass), paid packs in shop, and skins. 
There's also events where some of its reward is locked and you need use silver prime to unlock and get all the rewards.
It can be also exchanged for silver.

3rd - Silver
It's the free premium currency of the game. It's mainly used to buy limited pulls for limited-time banners. You can also use it to get more menophin (stamina).
You can try to pull for this one
Kathigu-Ra, commonly referred as Kath (nickname), is one of the current meta dps characters in game.
She scales her damage based on strength, arithmetic, and Fiamma stacks. She has both single-target and AOE attacks in her kit. She can provide good amount of shields for the team to survive battles.

There's one caveat this character has. To reach her full potential, you need to unlock her 3rd Enlighten, meaning you need 3 dupes on top of the base copy. So, that means you need to pull her 4 times.
But, she becomes really powerful and can carry you very far into the game.

content: Grab 1 vortice and 1 kathigu ra. You can purchase an item from the sediment shop to duplicate a character. You want to use 3 of those on Kath before playing with her, use vortice on the meanwhile
